title: UnderCraft
description: Add Undertale textures, songs and more to Minecraft.
body:
This texture packs aims to bring **Undertales** texures and more to Minecraft. If you have any suggestions, questions or something else join the [discord](https://discord.gg/9jxkTZW4Gd). As of the newest version(2.1) the following things have been changed. All recent changes are Bold.
### Custom textures:
- Wooden Sword -> Stick
- Stone Sword -> Toy Knife
- Iron Sword -> Burnt Pan
- Golden Sword -> Empty Gun
- Diamond Sword -> Worn Dagger
- Netherite Sword -> Real Knife
- Trident -> Undyne's Spear
- Totem of Undying -> Save Point (animated)
- Sword Slash -> Undertale Sword Slash
- Bread -> Legendary Hero
- Apple -> Crab Apple
- (Enchanted)Golden Apple -> (Enchanted)Golden Crab Apple
- Raw Beef -> Raw Beef in the Shape of Mettaton's Face
- Cooked Beef -> Steak in the Shap of Mettaton's Face
----
### Custom splash texts:
- It's you!
- Despite everything, it's still you.
- You're filled with determination.
- You're filled with detemmienation.
- It's a beautiful day outside.
- You feel like you're going to have a bad time.
- But nobody came.
- In this world it's kill or be killed.
- Really not feelin up to it right now. Sorry.
- Geeettttttt dunked on!!!
----
### Custom background music:
- **The End:**
Reunited, Asgore, Here We Are
- **The Nether:**
Ooo, Another Medium, Stronger Monsters, Core
- **Main Menu:**
Start Menu, Menu (Full)
---
### Custom Music Discs:
- **11 -> Song That Might Play When You Fight Sans**
- 13 -> Spider Dance
- 5 -> Home
- Blocks -> Undertale
- Cat -> Finale
- Chirp -> SAVE the World
- Creator -> Battle Against a True Hero
- Creator (Music Box) -> Bonetrousle
- Far -> Spear of Justice
- Mall -> Dummy
- Mellohi -> Once Upon a Time
- Otherside -> His Theme
- Pigstep -> Death by Glamour
- **Precipice -> Your Best Nightmare**
- Relic -> an Ending
- Stal -> Heartache
- Strad -> MEGALOVANIA
- Wait -> It's Raining Somewhere Else
- Ward -> Bring It in Guys
---
### Other
- **Custom Main Menu Background**
- **Custom UI Buttons**
- **Custom Click Sound**
- **Custom Hotbar**
